title: Preview · agents implementing the approved plan
summary:
## Implementing 🛠️

This is the **IMPLEMENT** look — the plan is approved and parallel coding work-streams are running. The status badge reads *agent working*, the progress track fills as work-streams complete, and the **Now: …** line shows what the agent is doing right now.

**What this fixture demonstrates:** the work-stream summary chip with mixed states (done / in-progress / to-do), the sub-agents list on the Tracing tab, the live token/tool feed, and the progress bar — the surfaces you watch while agents build.
codebaseMap:
## What's being touched

- `templates/fixtures/*` — four phase fixtures (**done**).
- `scripts/preview.py` — the harness: copy fixtures → `.workflow/tasks/`, stamp `index.html` from the current template, resolve `baseCommit`, open `/hub` (**in progress**).
- `dev.py` — new `preview` sub-command (**to do**).
- `tests/test_preview_fixtures.py` — JSON validity smoke test (**to do**).

planBlocks.title: 1. Fixtures directory ✅
planBlocks.body: Done. Four fixtures under `templates/fixtures/`, one per phase, each with the data files the server serves.

planBlocks.title: 2. preview.py harness ⏳
planBlocks.body: In progress. Copy + `index.html` stamping land; `baseCommit` resolution and the server hand-off are being wired now.
